name: Ansh Madaan
education: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology, B.Tech

projects.name: EEG-based Schizophrenia Detection using Deep Learning
projects.description: Developed a hybrid CNN–LSTM with attention model achieving 97% accuracy, applying bandpass filtering and temporal windowing for robust EEG feature extraction, and improving interpretability using Grad-CAM, Integrated Gradients, and attention weight visualization.

projects.name: Face Recognition-Based Chatbot Authentication System
projects.description: Built a secure chatbot access system using real-time face recognition with OpenCV, integrating facial authentication with conversational AI for personalized interaction, and ensuring high-accuracy face matching with efficient encoding and secure data handling.

projects.name: Voice Assisted Terminal
projects.description: Engineered a voice-controlled terminal enabling execution of complex shell operations via natural language, integrated Google’s generative AI models for intelligent command understanding, and published as a PyPI package.
